title: ageratina contigua
intro: Ageratina contigua, also known as the narrowleaf mountain mint, is a perennial herb native to the Americas, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is often used to treat various health issues such as colds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Ageratina contigua include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
